subject: [For Visibility] March CB Quarterly Management Meeting Agenda

content.answer:

Please see the proposed agenda for the upcoming CB management meeting with
Chris on 31th March, Tuesday.

For Discussion:

content.question: why do we have nothing on KR/JP?

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Will add KR/JP into the updates section.

The 6 topics we have under “discussion” are the topics we think that are
more relevant to CF/TP’s priorities that they would want to know more about

   -

   Multiple against TTS, YoY topline growth, full year PnL (key metrics
   that they are tracking closely regionally)
   -

   FBS (platform top priorities that cb contributes significantly in)
   -

   SLS: Iran War Impact to SLS Business & Update on Automation Initiatives
   -

   CN CI (Since shopee top competitors are all CN players, so thought this
   would be relevant for them)

We will keep the materials sharp and relevant instead of merely updating
them.

Let us know if you have anything in mind.

For Update:

   1.

   CNCB Update
   2.

   [Added] KR/JP CB Update
   3.

   CNLS Update
   4.

   CB LFF Update
   5.

   Counter Taobao Update
   6.

   SCS & Lovito Update
   7.

   SIP Update


*Max Goh*

Regional Cross Border
Mobile +65 9740 9806
